text.title: Pattern Memory Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Pattern Memory. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: capture-at-second-context
step.action: Author entry with confidence 0.5 + 2 context citations.

step.name: graduate-confidence
step.action: Increment confidence by +0.1 per success; demote by -0.1 per failure.

step.name: retire-or-merge
step.action: Merge near-duplicates; retire on repeated failure.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
